sections.title: SOS Moving — Expert Movers in North Hollywood
sections.content: Why choose SOS Moving?Valley Specialists: We effortlessly navigate busy corridors like Lankershim Blvd, tight apartment parking, and complex residential moves.Licensed & insured professionals: (USDOT 3398018, MC 1153871) 2,300+ happy customers with 4.9★ Google and 4.8★ Yelp reviews.Upfront pricing: Fair rates from $119/hr (3-4 hr minimum based on zip code). Zero hidden fees, no surprises.Why choose SOS Moving?What we deliver:Pro-Grade Protection: Secure wrapping for fragile and bulky items to ensure they stay safe during transit across the busy LA area.Custom Crating & Labeling: Purpose-built crates for your most valuable pieces and smart, room-by-room labeling.Complete Furniture Care: Safe disassembly, heavy-duty blanketing, and perfect reassembly at your new destination.What we deliver:
